title: Bundled Items
description: A mod that lets you bundle your items so they take up less space in an inventory.
body:
This is the Bundled Items Mod. A simple mod by puxped, previously under the Ember development team. This mod lets you bundle your items, essentially making a storage block of frequently acquired items so they use less valuable space in your inventory.

Many bundles are crafted using 9 of an item in a crafting grid, some however, are crafted using 8 items and a container (Bowl, Paper, Glass Vial, Quiver).
All bundles stack to 32, meaning you can have a maximum of 256/288 items in a single slot!

Bonus Feature: Shift-Right-Clicking allows you to decraft an item on the spot, and it also gives you back its container (it it has one).

Older versions of the mod (Forge 1.11 - 1.16) can be found on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bundled-items)

Bonus Bonus Feature: Bundled Firework Rockets can be used to spawn 9 fireworks at once!


Modpack Creators

You may freely use this mod in a public or private modpack, as long as you link to this modpage!


If you'd like to help or give suggestions, please leave a comment.

Languages the mod supports:
- English (US/UK) 
- German
- French (Unfinished!)
- Spanish (Unfinished!)
- Lolcat


If you wish to discuss something or contribute, you can join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/vbYEuMJtBE)
